results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
Equities hit records as geopolitical risks linger
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities
Geopolitical market impacts and investment perspectives for 2026 | J.P. Morgan Private Bank

summary: Middle East conflict (potential Strait of Hormuz closure), US blockade of Iranian ports, Venezuela unrest, NATO/Greenland tensions. IMF baseline: global growth 3.1%, inflation 4.4%. Adverse scenario: growth 2.5%, inflation 5.4%. Energy/defense sectors benefiting; consumer staples/utilities defensive plays.
